name: St George UT forklift hit, how fault determined?
description: Negligence proof via evidence; % fault reduces suit awards.

mainEntity.name: St George UT forklift hit, how fault determined?

acceptedAnswer.text: Negligence proof via evidence; % fault reduces suit awards.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Investigate negligence: training, speed, signals, maintenance; comparative fault reduces if shared.** Video/OSHA key.[1][5] Key factors: Operator error common; employer vicarious liability. UT pure comparative. Experts assign %.
